Speaker Carolinesays : Thanks so much, Mel! Seeing this pic just made me appreciate my love of reading even more. Books guide me, motivate me and help me discover who I am. They're a huge part of my journey, and this one's reminding me to keep going and never give up!

Speaker Melaniesays : That's awesome, Caroline! You drew it? What does it mean to you?
Speaker Carolinesays : Thanks, Melanie! Yeah, I drew it. It stands for freedom and being real. It's like a nudge to always stay true to myself and embrace my womanhood.
Speaker Melaniesays : I love it. Showing off our true selves is the best thing ever.
Speaker Carolinesays : Yep, Melanie! Being ourselves is such a great feeling. It's an ongoing adventure of learning and growing.
Speaker Melaniesays : Yep, Caroline. Life's about learning and exploring. Glad we can be on this trip together.

Speaker Carolinesays : Wow, Mel, family love and support is the best!
Speaker Melaniesays : Yeah, Caroline, my family's been great - their love and support really helped me through tough times. It's awesome! We even went on another camping trip in the forest.

Speaker Melaniesays : Wow, Caroline!  All those colors are incredible and the story it tells is so inspiring.

Speaker Melaniesays : That's so nice, Caroline! Art can be in the most unlikely places. Love and acceptance really can be found everywhere.

Speaker Melaniesays : Wow, Caroline, that's so nice! The colors are so bright and the flowers are so pretty. Art is such a source of joy.
Speaker Carolinesays : Thanks, Mel! Art gives me so much joy. It helps me show my feelings and freeze gorgeous moments, like a bouquet of flowers.

Speaker Melaniesays : Painting landscapes and still life is my favorite! Nature's amazing, here's a painting I did recently.
Speaker Carolinesays : Wow, Mel! Any more paintings coming up?
